name: citadel-server
description: CITADEL deep-scan backend — runs real open-source security scanners (Semgrep, Bandit, Trivy, Syft, Grype, Gitleaks, ClamAV) and serves the CITADEL SPA.

scripts.test: node test/smoke.js && node --test test/lib.test.js test/api.test.js test/cli.test.js
scripts.lint: cd .. && server/node_modules/.bin/eslint js server scripts cli
